_meta.purpose: InnerThought soul block 排序权重 + cap (主脑 Layer 1.5 inject)
_meta.philosophy: 防 'old thought sal=0.9 挤掉 new thought sal=0.7' BUG. Score = salience*w_sal + recency*w_rec. recency = e^(-age/halflife). 全可调 vocab, 不在 .py 硬编码.
rules: (1) Fresh thought + medium sal 应该赢 old thought + high sal (Sir 真痛: 想了一堆没体现)
(2) max_inject 5 让主脑看更多 thought, 不只 3 条 (老 cap 太严)
(3) max_chars 800 (老 500 cap 太严, 4-5 条 thought 各 ~140char 需 ~700)
(4) max_age_s 24h cap (老 thought 自然 decay, 不挤新)
_meta.extensible: Sir CLI scripts/inner_thought_soul_block_dump.py 可改权重 / halflife
